overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action RPG showing an armored monkey warrior traversing a snowy mountain ridge. The character walks along a narrow snow-covered path with steep drops to a turquoise body of water below, surrounded by dramatic rocky peaks under clear winter skies.

agents.ego_description: armored warrior walking steadily along the snow-covered mountain path with staff on back

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain path under character's feet
steep rocky cliffs visible across the water
deep turquoise body of water visible in the distance
dark jagged rocks lining the right side of the path
towering snow-covered mountain peaks in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of an armored warrior standing on a snowy mountain outcrop. The character begins walking forward along a narrow snow-covered trail, with turquoise water visible far below to the left and jagged rock formations lining the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with large boulders

events.description: character navigates around a large rock formation on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: warrior continues along the narrowing mountain path, maneuvering around rocky obstacles while heading toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: massive dark boulders emerging on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The warrior progresses along the mountain trail as the path becomes more rugged. Large rock formations emerge on the right, requiring the character to navigate around them. The distant cliffs across the water draw closer as the character approaches the edge of the ridge.

events.description: character stops briefly to look out over the vast mountain vista and turquoise water below

agents.ego_description: warrior pauses at the cliff edge to survey the landscape, then continues walking along the precipice overlooking the water

entered.detail: sheer vertical drop-off revealing the cliff face and water far below

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cliff edge and pauses to take in the breathtaking view of the turquoise water and distant peaks. After a brief moment, the warrior continues along the narrow snow-covered precipice, with the steep drop now clearly visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an armored warrior traverses a narrow mountain ridge that gradually opens into a vast panoramic vista. It begins with the character stepping forward from a snowy outcrop along a thin trail, flanked by jagged rock formations on the right and a deep drop to turquoise water on the left. As the warrior progresses, the terrain becomes more rugged, forcing the camera to navigate around emerging rock masses while the distant cliffs across the water draw closer. The scene then reaches a dramatic peak as the character pauses at the cliff's edge to overlook the expansive turquoise basin and surrounding peaks before finally continuing along the precarious, snow-covered precipice.
